packet_markdown:
# The Avenue Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: the-avenue-hollywood-1619-n-la-brea-ave
- Address: 1619 N La Brea Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90028
- Primary URL: https://theavenuehollywood.com/
- Management company: Greystar
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 3 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 3)
- Community stability: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 4

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: low

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site and current listings explicitly show total monthly price language and fee caveats rather than hiding all add-ons. Source: The Avenue official site (https://theavenuehollywood.com/). Note: Official copy states additional fees may apply and points renters to lease documents before applying.
- [review] Apartments.com currently shows a 4.8/5 rating across 25 reviews and uses total monthly price display. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-avenue-hollywood-hollywood-ca/pzblp3t/). Note: Apartments.com displayed 4.8 stars from 25 reviews and total monthly price visibility.
- [review] Birdeye shows a meaningful body of public resident reviews for the property. Source: Birdeye (https://reviews.birdeye.com/the-avenue-hollywood-apartments-149468111686563). Note: Birdeye showed 112 customer reviews in the public profile.

## Open questions
- Confirm package handling and collect broader resident-operation signal beyond the currently visible public review set.

## Notes
Tour candidate. The Avenue stands out for published total monthly pricing, strong amenities, and decent public review depth. The main issue is not missing functionality but exposure management on La Brea and making sure package operations are as good as the marketing.
